## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] If the daemon HTTP / MCP surface changed: docs updated (`README.md`, `docs/GETTING_STARTED.md`)
- [ ] If env vars added/changed: `.env.example` updated
- [ ] No `Co-Authored-By` / `🤖 Generated` / `noreply@anthropic.com` / Claude-attribution leaks
- [ ] No secrets in commit content
